extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primož won the 2020 Vuelta GC by 24 seconds over CARAPAZ after surviving a late challenge on Stage 17 that nearly cost him the jersey.
tactical_patterns: Movistar won team classification 11th time suggesting consistent depth beats individual star power in three-week calculations.
Stage 17 nearly reversed 24-second final margin indicating Carapaz had late-race form superiority Roglic couldn't match climbing.

rider_signals.CARAPAZ Richard: positive: challenged Roglic seriously on Stage 17 final climb, suggesting he peaked later than GC rivals in third week
rider_signals.CARTHY Hugh: positive: stage win at Angliru plus top-3 GC finish signals genuine Grand Tour podium capability not fluke
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: stage win and fourth overall with threatening final week suggests pre-race underestimation of form
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: battled to stay top-10 at age 40, indicating declining climbing margins versus true GC contenders
